div1.entryFree: Sacrament, the Eucharist: ere I last received the s. I did confess it, R2 I, 1, 139. Vows made and oaths taken on the sacrament; hence to receive the s. == to take an oath: thou didst receive the holy s. to fight in quarrel of the house of Lancaster, R3 I, 4, 208. to take the s.: All's IV, 3, 156. John V, 2, 6. R2 IV, 328. V, 2, 97. H6A IV, 2, 28. R3 V, 5, 18.
